local_baseline.comparison: canonical (sorted-key) sha256 of the decoded records; serialization-order-independent
local_baseline.computed_by: kobold-batch (offline core; identical process_records/record_to_json to the Lambda handler)

how_to_run_live: lab/lambda-live/deploy-and-invoke.sh (requires AWS credentials; deploys once, invokes once, captures metadata, compares canonically, writes this receipt, deletes the function)
non_claims: not deployed to live AWS yet
not invoked on live AWS in repo CI
one deploy + one invoke, then deleted
no semantic authority -- decode correctness is gnucobol-rs/kobold-data-shim, not this layer
not a cost/SLA/throughput claim (see GLUE/LAMBDA.SCALE.1, future)
